intent: From the Planner page, click each export button in turn and capture the generated deployment config for vLLM, llama.cpp, and MLX.

steps.blind_description: Terminal showing monospaced output with a block of numeric columns. (frame slug: planner-ready)
steps.intent: Planner page ready with a concrete plan already computed; we scroll down to the Export Configuration row.

steps.blind_description: Command-line prompt with recently-emitted lines of hex-coloured log output. (frame slug: export-row)
steps.intent: Export Configuration row in view: three buttons — Export as vLLM, Export as llama.cpp, Export as MLX.

steps.blind_description: Dark terminal displaying a table of CLI results and a blinking cursor at the bottom. (frame slug: vllm-config)
steps.intent: vLLM click: JSON payload with --model, --max-model-len, --max-num-seqs rendered in a code block.

steps.blind_description: Shell session showing a command header and a paragraph of structured stdout. (frame slug: llama-config)
steps.intent: llama.cpp click: CLI arg string (-m, -c, -ngl) emitted for the same plan parameters.

steps.blind_description: Terminal window with a list-style summary and no visible error indicator. (frame slug: mlx-config)
steps.intent: MLX click: Apple Silicon deploy config serialised as JSON, completing the export triple.
